# NCAA Basketball Prediction Model Templates

This directory contains standardized templates for project documentation and workflow. Using these templates ensures consistency and completeness in our development process.

## Available Templates

### Project Documentation Templates

| Template | Purpose | When to Use |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| [Milestone Template](milestone_template.md) | Documents a complete project milestone | At the beginning of planning each milestone |
| [Task Template](task_template.md) | Documents a specific task within a milestone | When breaking down milestones into actionable tasks |
| [Issue Template](issue_template.md) | Tracks bugs and other issues | When identifying problems that need resolution |
| [PR Template](pr_template.md) | Standardizes pull request information | When submitting code changes for review |

## Template Usage Guidelines

### For Milestone Documentation

1. Copy the `milestone_template.md` to `docs/development/milestones/milestoneX-name.md`
2. Fill out the template with milestone-specific information
3. Link the milestone document from the milestone index in `docs/development/milestones/index.md`
4. Update the milestone status in the main `MILESTONES.md` file

### For Tasks

1. Copy the `task_template.md` to the relevant location or use as a reference when creating GitHub issues
2. Ensure each task is linked to a specific milestone
3. Break down complex tasks into manageable subtasks
4. Update task status regularly

### For Issues

1. Copy the `issue_template.md` or use as a reference when creating GitHub issues
2. Provide detailed reproduction steps for bugs
3. Link issues to affected milestones and tasks
4. Prioritize issues based on impact and urgency

### For Pull Requests

1. Use the `pr_template.md` as a reference when creating pull requests
2. Ensure all checklist items are addressed
3. Link PRs to relevant tasks and issues
4. Request reviews from appropriate team members

## Template Customization

These templates are designed to be flexible. Feel free to:

1. Add or remove sections as needed for specific use cases
2. Adapt the level of detail based on project complexity
3. Propose improvements to the templates themselves

## Template Maintenance

If you find that a template is missing important information or could be improved:

1. Create an issue describing the proposed changes
2. Submit a PR with the updated template
3. Once approved, update any documentation that references the template
